label: SKILL
description: Kích hoạt khi người dùng yêu cầu "chuẩn hóa" hoặc "normalize" một file. Workflow này đảm bảo AI luôn đọc các quy tắc chuẩn hóa trước khi thực hiện.

label: business-rules
description: Collection of systemic business rules governing content lifecycle, audit, and security.

label: use-cases
description: Interactive use cases for portfolio owners and recruiters.

label: user-flows
description: Sequence diagrams and path flows representing content state transition.

label: api
description: REST/GraphQL API specification for front-facing portfolio and administration workspace.

label: architecture
description: Overall structural and architectural choices for backend modules, API integration, and frontend components.

label: database
description: Relational model, collections, and index configurations for auditing and storing versioned portfolio contents.

label: prd
description: PRD defines the technical scope, features, and workflows for MyPortfolio.

label: rtm
description: Matrix mapping requirements to design, code, and test artifacts.

label: ui-guidelines
description: Visual system, typography, colors, layout components, and dark-mode styling rules.

label: api
description: Endpoints for login validation, token issuance, and logout endpoints.

label: flow
description: Sequence diagrams mapping credentials submission to dashboard access.

label: overview
description: Module handling system authentication, access rules, session validation, and owner authorization.

label: requirements
description: Specific authentication constraints, e.g. single owner account, session timeouts.

label: flow
description: Visual flow outlining redirection to external gateway.

label: overview
description: Module structure for donation setups, Stripe integrations, or billing elements.

label: requirements
description: Outlining requirements for billing, invoice logs, or donation features.
